narrative.narrative: BTC consolidates around $63k as market sentiment turns neutral, mirroring the prolonged sideways regime in August 2024; traders should prepare for rangebound price action.
narrative.headline: Bitcoin Enters Holding Pattern

disagreements_noted: Pattern Analyst has lower confidence compared to the Narrative Writer.
